_instructions: Cafeteria & Co. - 15, Ground Floor, Cyber Hub, DLF Cyber City, Gurgaon.
Dasaprakash - SCO 344, 1st Floor, Behind Radisson Hotel, Sector 29, Gurugram, Haryana 122001.
Bartari Resto Bar & Club - Unit 4 First Floor, Elan Epic Mall, Near Sector 70, Sector 69, Gurgaon.

Menu extracted from 11 menu screenshots: Fusion Sushi Bar & Hand Roll, Tossed Salads, Dim Sums, Small Plates, Start Me Up, Ultimate Dippers, Chicago Fries, House Fries, Tandoori Dippers, Mezze Platters, Country Burgers & Club Sandwiches, Pastas, Pizzas, Full Meals, Ice Cream Sundaes, and French Crepes.
Dasaprakash menu extracted from 2 unique menu screenshot spreads: Dosas & Uttapam, South Indian Delicacies, Rice, Vada, South Indian Favourites, Extras, Thali and Platters.
Bartari menu extracted from 11 menu screenshots: Desserts, Liquor Infused Food, Biryani & Rice, Indian Mains, Noodles & Fried Rice, Pan Asian Mains, Grills & Steaks, Pasta & Risotto, and Dimsum.
Coordinates were intentionally left null because exact Google Maps coordinates were not provided.
